text: Book Title: engineering mathematics i. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 1st. Description: covers differential calculus, integral calculus, vector calculus, matrix algebra, and coordinate geometry for engineering applications. standard reference for first year cse mathematics..
title: engineering mathematics i

text: Book Title: structured programming language (c programming). Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 1st. Description: the c programming language by kernighan and ritchie is the definitive reference for c programming. covers structured programming fundamentals, pointers, arrays, functions, and file i/o used in cse foundation courses..
title: structured programming language (c programming)

text: Book Title: physics for scientists and engineers. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 1st. Description: covers mechanics, heat, thermodynamics, waves, and optics. standard physics reference for first year cse students covering all foundational topics required for engineering programs..
title: physics for scientists and engineers

text: Book Title: communicative english for undergraduate students. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 1st. Description: communicative english textbook designed for undergraduate engineering students in bangladesh. covers reading, writing, listening, and speaking skills for academic and professional communication..
title: communicative english for undergraduate students

text: Book Title: engineering mathematics ii. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 2nd. Description: covers ordinary differential equations, laplace transforms, fourier series, partial differential equations, and complex variable analysis. continuation of engineering mathematics i for second semester cse students..
title: engineering mathematics ii

text: Book Title: data structures and algorithm analysis in c. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 2nd. Description: covers arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, sorting, and searching algorithms with implementation in c. fundamental data structures reference for cse undergraduate students..
title: data structures and algorithm analysis in c

text: Book Title: digital logic and computer design. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 2nd. Description: covers boolean algebra, logic gates, combinational circuits, sequential circuits, registers, counters, and memory units. essential reference for digital logic design course in cse programs..
title: digital logic and computer design

text: Book Title: bangladesh studies. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 2nd. Description: covers the history of bangladesh, language movement, liberation war of 1971, constitutional development, socio-economic conditions, and professional ethics for undergraduate engineering students..
title: bangladesh studies

text: Book Title: discrete mathematics and its applications. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 3rd. Description: covers logic, sets, functions, relations, graph theory, trees, combinatorics, probability, and number theory. foundational mathematics for computer science and algorithm design..
title: discrete mathematics and its applications

text: Book Title: java: how to program (object oriented programming). Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 3rd. Description: covers oop concepts including classes, objects, inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation, abstraction, interfaces, exception handling, and generics using java. widely used reference for oop courses in bangladesh..
title: java: how to program (object oriented programming)

text: Book Title: introduction to algorithms. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 3rd. Description: clrs is the definitive algorithms textbook. covers sorting, searching, graph algorithms, dynamic programming, greedy algorithms, np-completeness, and advanced data structures with rigorous mathematical analysis..
title: introduction to algorithms

text: Book Title: fundamentals of electric circuits. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 3rd. Description: covers basic circuit analysis, kirchhoff laws, node and mesh analysis, ac circuits, phasors, transformers, and frequency response. standard electrical circuits textbook for cse students..
title: fundamentals of electric circuits

text: Book Title: computer organization and architecture. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 4th. Description: covers cpu design, instruction sets, memory hierarchy, cache, i/o systems, pipelining, and parallel processing. essential reference for computer organization and architecture course..
title: computer organization and architecture

text: Book Title: database system concepts. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 4th. Description: covers relational model, sql, er diagrams, normalization, transaction management, concurrency control, indexing, and distributed databases. definitive textbook for database management systems..
title: database system concepts

text: Book Title: introduction to the theory of computation. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 4th. Description: covers finite automata, regular languages, context-free grammars, pushdown automata, turing machines, decidability, and computational complexity. standard reference for automata and formal language theory..
title: introduction to the theory of computation

text: Book Title: probability and statistics for engineering and the sciences. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 4th. Description: covers probability theory, random variables, distributions, statistical inference, hypothesis testing, regression analysis, and quality control. standard probability and statistics text for engineering students..
title: probability and statistics for engineering and the sciences

text: Book Title: operating system concepts. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 5th. Description: covers processes, threads, cpu scheduling, deadlocks, memory management, virtual memory, file systems, i/o systems, and security. the dinosaur book is the primary reference for operating systems courses worldwide..
title: operating system concepts

text: Book Title: computer networks. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 5th. Description: covers osi model, tcp/ip, data link layer, network layer, transport layer, application layer protocols, network security, and wireless networks. comprehensive reference for computer networking courses..
title: computer networks

text: Book Title: software engineering. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 5th. Description: covers software development life cycle, requirements engineering, design patterns, uml, testing strategies, project management, and agile methodologies. the standard reference for software engineering courses..
title: software engineering

text: Book Title: microprocessors and interfacing: programming and hardware. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 5th. Description: covers 8086/8088 microprocessor architecture, assembly language programming, interrupt handling, memory interfacing, and peripheral devices. standard reference for microprocessor courses in bangladeshi universities..
title: microprocessors and interfacing: programming and hardware

text: Book Title: compilers: principles, techniques, and tools. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 6th. Description: the dragon book covers lexical analysis, parsing, syntax-directed translation, intermediate code generation, code optimization, and code generation. definitive reference for compiler design and construction..
title: compilers: principles, techniques, and tools

text: Book Title: artificial intelligence: a modern approach. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 6th. Description: covers intelligent agents, search algorithms, csp, adversarial search, logical inference, probabilistic reasoning, machine learning, nlp, robotics, and ethics of ai. the standard ai textbook worldwide..
title: artificial intelligence: a modern approach

text: Book Title: computer graphics: principles and practice. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 6th. Description: covers 2d and 3d graphics, geometric transformations, rasterization, illumination models, texture mapping, ray tracing, and opengl. comprehensive reference for computer graphics programming..
title: computer graphics: principles and practice

text: Book Title: numerical methods for engineers. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 6th. Description: covers numerical solutions to equations, interpolation, numerical differentiation and integration, ordinary and partial differential equations, and linear systems. essential reference for numerical methods in cse..
title: numerical methods for engineers

text: Book Title: cryptography and network security: principles and practice. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 7th. Description: covers symmetric and asymmetric encryption, des, aes, rsa, hash functions, digital signatures, ssl/tls, firewalls, and intrusion detection systems. comprehensive reference for network security courses..
title: cryptography and network security: principles and practice

text: Book Title: machine learning. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 7th. Description: covers decision trees, neural networks, bayesian learning, instance-based learning, genetic algorithms, reinforcement learning, and analytical learning. foundational machine learning reference for cse students..
title: machine learning

text: Book Title: distributed systems: principles and paradigms. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 7th. Description: covers distributed system architectures, communication, naming, synchronization, consistency and replication, fault tolerance, and distributed file systems. comprehensive reference for distributed systems..
title: distributed systems: principles and paradigms

text: Book Title: pattern recognition and machine learning. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 7th. Description: covers bayesian decision theory, linear models, neural networks, kernel methods, graphical models, mixture models, em algorithm, and approximate inference. advanced reference for pattern recognition..
title: pattern recognition and machine learning

text: Book Title: digital image processing. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 8th. Description: covers image fundamentals, spatial filtering, frequency domain filtering, image restoration, image compression, morphological processing, image segmentation, and feature representation..
title: digital image processing

text: Book Title: introduction to information retrieval. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 8th. Description: covers boolean retrieval, tf-idf, vector space model, probabilistic information retrieval, ranked retrieval, evaluation, text classification, clustering, and web search and crawling..
title: introduction to information retrieval

text: Book Title: cloud computing: concepts, technology & architecture. Author: . Department: cse. Semester: 8th. title: cloud computing: concepts, technology & architecture
